subcodes.first_line: O my winsome friend and cherished companion! It hath been some time since, due to the calumnies of slanderers, I have withdrawn into seclusion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دلنشین من و دوست نازنین من مدتی است که از سعایت مفتریان بگوشه عزلت خزیده
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @consolation and comfort
